zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Foliot 2nd Lord Foliot於1284年4月19日出生在英國諾福爾可格雷哈爾時，他的父親Jordan de Foliot ,1st baron of Foliot34歲，母親Margery de Newmarch47歲。他於1310年9月16日與Joan de Braose結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1317年7月23日之前在英國蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Foliot 2nd Lord Foliot于1284年4月19日出生在英国諾福爾可格雷哈爾时，他的父亲Jordan de Foliot ,1st baron of Foliot34岁，母亲Margery de Newmarch47岁。他于1310年9月16日与Joan de Braose结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1317年7月23日之前在英国苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Foliot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Italian (Lombardy): variant of   Foglio  . This surname is very rare in Italy.

variants.name: Foglio
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Carmine, Dino, Flavio, Julieta, Sal, Salvatore.
Italian: probably from the Latin personal name Folius (which is embodied in the common placename Fogliano).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Foliot 2nd Lord Foliot was born on 19 April 1284, in Gressenhall, Norfolk, England, his father, Jordan de Foliot ,1st baron of Foliot, was 34 and his mother, Margery de Newmarch, was 47. He married Joan de Braose on 16 September 1310. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died before 23 July 1317, in Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Foliot 2nd Lord Foliot est né le 19 avril 1284, à Gressenhall, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Jordan de Foliot ,1st baron of Foliot, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Margery de Newmarch, avait 47 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Braose le 16 septembre 1310. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé avant 23 juillet 1317, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Foliot 2nd Lord Foliot am 19. April 1284 in Gressenhall, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jordan de Foliot ,1st baron of Foliot 34 und seine Mutter Margery de Newmarch 47. Er hat am 16. September 1310 Joan de Braose geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb vor 23. Juli 1317 in Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Foliot 2nd Lord Foliot è nato il il 19 aprile 1284 nel Gressenhall, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Jordan de Foliot ,1st baron of Foliot, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Margery de Newmarch, aveva 47 anni. Lui sposato Joan de Braose il 16 settembre 1310. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì prima del 23 luglio 1317, nel Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Foliot 2nd Lord Foliotが1284年4月19日にイギリスノーフォルクグレセンハルで生まれた時，父Jordan de Foliot ,1st baron of Foliotは34歳，母Margery de Newmarchは47歳であった。1310年9月16日にJoan de Braoseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1317年7月23日以前にイギリススコットランドで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Foliot 2nd Lord Foliot(이)가 1284년 4월 19일 영국 노르폴크 그레센홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jordan de Foliot ,1st baron of Foliot(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery de Newmarch(은)는 47세였다. 그는 1310년 9월 16일 Joan de Braose(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1317년 7월 23일 이전 영국 스코틀랜드에서 사망했다.

pt.19 April 1284–Bef 23 July 1317: 19 de abril de 1284–antes 23 de julho de 1317
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Foliot 2nd Lord Foliot nasceu em 19 de abril de 1284, em Gressenhall, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Jordan de Foliot ,1st baron of Foliot, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Margery de Newmarch, tinha 47 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de Braose em 16 de setembro de 1310. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 23 de julho de 1317, em Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Foliot 2nd Lord Foliot родился 19 апреля 1284 г. в местности грессенолл, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Jordan de Foliot ,1st baron of Foliot было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Margery de Newmarch, 47. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Braose 16 сентября 1310 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер перед 23 июля 1317 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.19 April 1284–Bef 23 July 1317: 19 de abril de 1284–antes de 23 de julio de 1317
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Foliot 2nd Lord Foliot nació el 19 de abril de 1284, en Gressenhall, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Jordan de Foliot ,1st baron of Foliot, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Margery de Newmarch, tenía 47 años. Se casó con Joan de Braose el 16 de septiembre de 1310. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió antes de 23 de julio de 1317, en Escocia, Reino Unido.
